recent_trades.reasoning: STOP-LOSS: Close Crude Oil $110 NO position immediately. News reports oil at $110-115/barrel — NOT $96.91 as Yahoo API showed (stale data). Oil already at or above $110 means this market likely resolves YES. Our NO position is a loss. Cut now before it gets worse.

Crude Oil $110 by end of March — buying NO at $0.59. Current crude price: $96.85 (today's high $99.17). Needs +13.6% in 12 days to hit $110. Even with Iran gas facility attacks, $110 requires an extreme supply shock beyond current conflict. Historical: oil rarely moves +$13 in 12 days. Market says 41% chance — my estimate 20-25%. Edge ~17% after fees.

Iranian regime fall by June 30 — buying NO at $0.725. Market says 27.5% chance of regime change in 3.5 months. US intelligence chief says regime is 'intact but degraded'. Regime changes are historically rare even under heavy military pressure — IRGC and domestic security apparatus remain functional. My estimate: 10-15% chance of regime fall. Edge ~15% raw, ~13.6% after 2% taker fees. Confidence: medium-high.
